channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Near bush outside 11, 9th May
item.description:
Dumped tyre and suitcase

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gladstone Mews, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deceased badger, entrance to Lee Valley Country Park, 9th May
item.description:
Deceased badger at entrance to Lee Valley Country Park been placed by a pole, opposite the Highbridge Retail Park in Waltham Abbey EN9 1BY

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Waltham Cross, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road repair, 9th May
item.description:
The road was recently closed to repair damage in the road however, the road repair that has been done is more dangerous to drivers than the initial pothole. The road repair is extremely poor and is causing more damage to cars than potholes ever did.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 9th May
item.description:
Street cleaners are missing the litter on the Green

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falconwood Parade, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish everywhere. WE NEEDS BINS ALONG THE ROAD, 9th May
item.description:
There is constant rubbish all alomg shortlands road on a daily basis because there are no bins amy-where. please could we have at least 6 bins dotted along the rosd as there seems to be a problem on this road. many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 9th May
item.description:
Graffiti on both of these grey electrical boxes. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped chair, 9th May
item.description:
This chair was fly tipped in the street out side 10 Queensdown Road. I’ve put it inside the gate so that it does not get in the way of car parking but can you remove it please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensdown Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water fountain tap is not locked, 9th May
item.description:
This water tap (separate from the water fountain) is accessible to children. It looks like the cover is broken or the lock has been removed. Children are turning the tap on and leaving it running, wasting huge amounts of water and leaving muddy areas in the playground.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84, East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On constant demand, 9th May
item.description:
Keep changing to red as it appears button stuck in
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gooshays Drive, Harold Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public Litter Bin, 9th May
item.description:
Bus stop public litter bin is badly overflowing again, with litter strewn around.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 9th May
item.description:
Large cardboard box on pavement, leaning up against wall.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 9th May
item.description:
Small stack of boxes and household stuff left on pavement around this area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pole 4 signal head is covered with foliage, local council need to be informed., 9th May
item.description:
Pole 4 signal head is covered with foliage, local council need to be informed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 189, Old Brompton Road, South Kensington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 38 Chesterfield Grove-Flytipping, 9th May
item.description:
Items blocking the pavement. It needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grove Vale (next to Pret a Manger)-Trolley, 9th May
item.description:
Shopping Trolley flytipped, the Trolley is blocking pavement and can also go into the busy road. It needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-15, Vale End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 16 Melbourne Grove-Waste Overflowing, 9th May
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied due to overflowing waste.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tell Grove-Waste overflowing, 9th May
item.description:
The bin at Tell Grove needs to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Tell Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This bin is never emptied, 9th May
item.description:
This is never emptied and people then leave around the base as it is jam packed or dump thier rubbish on the grass area. I live right next to this area. It is disgusting and embarrassing for people visiting.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandbach Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees growing out into path. Another plant looks like brambles but not with sticky leaves onto path, 9th May
item.description:
Trees need thinning back, close to street light,makes the path narrow. There are also a different plant, looks like brambles but not, has sticky leaves which is expanding across the path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to 42 A Charlotte Street W1, 8th May
item.description:
The light has stopped working. Can it be fixed please? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Goodge Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
